debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
m : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : Ω → Set ι
u : Set ι
p : ↑unitInterval
P : Measure Ω
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsBernoulliOn ι Ω m X u p P
⊢ iIndepFun (fun i ω => i ∈ X ω) P

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
  classical
  let μ : Measure (ι → Prop) :=
    infinitePi fun i ↦ toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False
  have hsymm : MeasurePreserving MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm (Ber(u, p)) μ := by
    refine ⟨MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm.measurable, ?_⟩
    simp [bernoulliOn_eq_map (u := u) (p := p), μ, Measure.map_map]
  have hX' : MeasurePreserving X P (Ber(u, p)) := ⟨hX.measurable, hX.map_eq⟩
  have hZ : MeasurePreserving (fun ω : Ω ↦ MeasurableEquiv.setOf.symm (X ω)) P μ := hsymm.comp hX'
  have hind : iIndepFun (fun i (f : ι → Prop) ↦ f i) μ := by
    simpa [μ] using
      (iIndepFun_infinitePi fun i ↦
        toNNReal p • dirac (i ∈ u) + toNNReal (σ p) • dirac False)
  simpa using hind.comp hZ
